title: lolium temulentum var. speciosum
intro: Lolium temulentum var. speciosum, also known as Darnel or Poisonous Ryegrass, is a toxic grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anthelmintic, diuretic, and emetic effects, although its toxicity should be taken into consideration. In herbal preparations, Lolium temulentum var. speciosum is sometimes used to treat conditions such as indigestion and fever, although the use of this plant is not recommended due to its toxicity. However, there is limited information on the health benefits and safe preparations of this plant, making it crucial to exercise caution when handling it.
